text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D, Version 2 │ May 2026 │ V 1.2 
56 
SSA_DIB_PRMRY_IMPRMNT_CD 
LABEL: 
SSA Disability Insurance Benefit Dx Primary Impairment Code 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the disability primary impairment diagnosis code from the Social Security 
Administration (SSA). The SSA groups diagnoses into categories. 
LONG NAME: SSA_DIB_PRMRY_IMPRMNT_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
4 
SOURCE: 
CMS Common Medicare
